title: HERC with CDaR for multi-asset combiner (Paso 2)
source: H&T HRP article (cached at [cache/blogs/ht_hrp.txt](cache/blogs/ht_hrp.txt)); quotes Raffinot's claim that HRP itself has known flaws (single-linkage chaining, no dendrogram-respecting bisection, variance-only risk) — HERC with CDaR risk measure is the current evolved recommendation.
why: When Paso 2 has ≥3 signal/asset combinations, naive equal-weight or vanilla HRP under-perform HERC empirically. PortfolioLab has a ready implementation.
scope: new `pipeline/portfolio.py` for Paso 2 multi-asset H4 combiner; does not touch existing D1 path.
